/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/GameDevelopmentProject.dir/source/main.cpp.o -o GameDevelopmentProject  glfw_build/src/libglfw3.a lib/libGLEW.a -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit -framework QuartzCore -framework CoreFoundation -framework OpenGL
